## How to manage and make data FAIR? {background-image="assets/background-shapes.svg" background-size="cover" background-opacity="0.8"}


:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](assets/OBIS_logo_blue.png){fig-align="center" width="50%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](assets/DarwinCore-TDWG-logo.png){fig-align="center" width="70%"}
:::
::::


::: {.notes}
How do we make data FAIR - OBIS + DwC standard! 
:::
